languages.text: "Пока это не мешает вашей службе Империуму — дозволяю".
"As long as it does not hinder your service to the Imperium, I will allow it."
languages.original_text: "Пока это не мешает вашей службе Империуму — дозволяю".

traits.locale_text: "As long as it does not hinder your service to the Imperium, I will allow it."

languages.text: “只要这些习俗不会影响你为帝国服务，我就允许你这么做。”
languages.original_text: "As long as it does not hinder your service to the Imperium, I will allow it."

traits.locale_text: “只要这些习俗不会影响你为帝国服务，我就允许你这么做。”

languages.text: 「帝国への奉仕に支障を来さぬ限りは、認めてやろう」
languages.original_text: "As long as it does not hinder your service to the Imperium, I will allow it."

traits.locale_text: 「帝国への奉仕に支障を来さぬ限りは、認めてやろう」

languages.text: «Lo consentiré en tanto no suponga ningún impedimento para su servicio al Imperium».
languages.original_text: "As long as it does not hinder your service to the Imperium, I will allow it."

traits.locale_text: «Lo consentiré en tanto no suponga ningún impedimento para su servicio al Imperium».

languages.original_text: "As long as it does not hinder your service to the Imperium, I will allow it."

languages.text: « Tant que cela ne vous empêche pas de servir l'Imperium, je ne vois aucune raison de m'y opposer. »
languages.original_text: "As long as it does not hinder your service to the Imperium, I will allow it."

traits.locale_text: « Tant que cela ne vous empêche pas de servir l'Imperium, je ne vois aucune raison de m'y opposer. »

languages.text: "Solange Euer Dienst für das Imperium dadurch nicht behindert wird, gestatte ich es."
languages.original_text: "As long as it does not hinder your service to the Imperium, I will allow it."
